title: 10 Natural Herbal Tinctures for Elderly with Ulcerative Colitis
description: Aloe vera tinctures may help with ulcerative colitis due to its anti-inflammatory properties. Aloe vera contains compounds like aloin, aloe-emodin, and vitamins A, C, and E, which help reduce inflammation and promote healing in the gut. The tannins and anthraquinones in aloe vera may also soothe the digestive tract and reduce symptoms like diarrhea and abdominal pain.
